message:
test(fcp-mesh): add comprehensive mesh integration tests

Implement 32 integration tests for fcp-mesh crate covering:

- Routing: symbol routing with data locality, control-plane routing,
  multi-hop exclusions, load balancing, connector version compatibility
- Admission Control: valid requests, rate limiting (bytes/symbols),
  anti-amplification, authentication requirements, failed auth tracking
- Policy Enforcement: zone boundaries, memory requirements, GPU
  requirements, singleton writer leases, required symbols constraints
- Gossip Integration: object/symbol availability announcements,
  summary creation, filter membership checks, bounded object listing
- Lease Coordination: singleton writer, operation execution, coordinator
  election, lease holder priority, conflict detection
- Integration Scenarios: full mesh routing, admission routing, gossip
  routing integration

All tests emit structured JSON logging for CI/CD integration.
Run via: cargo test -p fcp-mesh --test mesh_integration

Implements: flywheel_connectors-1n78.17.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
